feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC ODE Story error
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our SAC Stories were working fine, but ever since SAC Q4 releases, We are getting below error when we open SAC story which was built on ODE version. 
Does anyone facing similar kind of error?, Please advise.
[Application Error]:Reduce of empty array with no initial value
Correlation ID: 42899926-2344-4967-b264-383279313435 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Aggregated measure restricted by dimension input control
entry.content:
Hello, i would like to create a measure that shows the average of another measure. However, this average should be restricted by several input controls. I used the aggregated measure and the condition, but somehow in the chart, nothing changed when i selected one particular dimension.
Help very appreciated.

entry.title: SAC Scripting - Passing Dimension filter from One table to Another
entry.content:
Hi,

In this blog, you would find the solution to pass filter dimensions between 2 tables on the Story/page load in SAP Analytics cloud.

As you all know SAC Story has a standard feature to link dimensions between models and onclick on the dimension from one table will filter the respective dimension values on another table through Linked Analysis.

But Our requirement is to pass the dimension filter from one table to another on the Story load without any manual intervention(Clicks).

Step1 : Create a link Dimension between the 2 tables and map the common field

 

Step2 : Bring in the 2 tables(Say Table_3 & Table_5 in our Case) with the required fields to display

Step3 : Link the 2 tables using Linked Analysis and check the "Filter On Data Points"

Step 4 : Go to the left pane and choose fx onInitialization on the current page

Step 5 : Use the below script, which on the page load will filter the Account numbers on Table 3 and pass the filtered dimension values to Table 5.

 

Script : 

var resultSet = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultSet();
var MyTable=ArrayUtils.create(Type.string);
console.log(MyTable);
 
if (resultSet.length < 1)
{
Table_5.setVisible(false);
}
else
{
for (var i=0;i< resultSet.length; i++)
{ MyTable.push(resultSet[i]["AccountNo_DISPLAY_KEY"].id);
//CheckboxGroup_1.addItem(MyTable[i]);
        //Dropdown_1.addItem(MyTable[i]);
        Table_5.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("AccountNo_DISPLAY_KEY",MyTable);
}
};

This script will work on similar scenario to pass filtered dimensions from Table1  to a Dropdown or Checkbox as well.

Thanks,

Soniya

entry.title: Question Regarding Using Customized Currency and Symbol in SAC Charts
entry.content:
Our product includes a list of currency codes, some of which are customer-defined and may differ from ISO standards. We want to use our own dictionary table/master table with our own currency code and related symbol to be shown in SAC chart at SAC UI.

I don't know how can I make our own defined currency code and symbol take effect at SAC UI during model define.

We use SAC embedded Lite, and use CDS and java CAP framework to define the analytic models for SAC. I followed by document of  SAC CAP Documentation and tried below two approaches to figure out the currency logic behind SAC:

Try1:

I attempted to use SAC's currency feature. I defined a CurrencyCode in the entity with the type String, like this:

CurrencyCode: String;

And then added an annotation on FlightPrice:

@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: CurrencyCode

FlightPrice: Decimal;

Even without defining the currency code's master data/dictionary table, no any symbol of the currency code provided in CAP service at all, the symbol still appears in SAC when displaying FlightPrice in a chart.see below screenshot of SAC UI:

I suspect this is because SAC has an internal dictionary table mapping currency codes to symbols.Is that true?

Try 2:

I tried defining CurrencyCode as a custom currency type AnnaCurrency see below:

and used my own data file, MyCurrencies.csv, like this:

Then I used this custom type in the entity:

CurrencyCode: AnnaCurrency;

And then add the corresponding annotation in analytic model according to the document of SAC CAP Documentation

After testing in SAC, the symbol for AUD still shows as A$, instead of the custom symbol (£) defined in MyCurrencies.csv.

Questions:

  1. If I don't provide currency data reference table/dictionary table/master data with the symbol info of each currency code, does SAC use its own predefined currency data? If so, is this ISO-based?
  2. How can I use my custom currency data with my own symbol? Why does my previous attempt not work as expected?

entry.title: Dimension data access control & Admin authorization - SAC
entry.content:
Hello,
In a model I built, I added data access control to a dimension with two members.
The setup is intended so that "Base" is read-only, while "Manual" allows write access.
However, I was able to write in "Base" and publish.
Did I set something up incorrectly, or is this because I have "Admin" rights in the system?

Thank you

entry.title: How to set SAC chart tooltip values using script
entry.content:
Hello All

I have a use case, I have made a script like when we select values from a table which uses a single dimension and the dimension is changed using input dimension control. When a values is selected inside the table then the line chart which is above this table will be updated with the current dimension. But on the tooltip I am unable to see the dimension name, is there a way we can do this. Your responses will be of great help.

Thank you

entry.title: SAC: missing updates for KBA 3533963 ? (Table.onSelect not triggered anymore)
entry.content:
Hi,
KBA 3533963 was released on 30.10.2024 and describes that standard events like Table.onSelect are not triggered anymore as they used to be.
in my case I have 2 strories with tables where selection type is set to single cell (as a workaround for open improvement request 280582 ).
Since Q4 update users have to right-click in the table to trigger event .onSelect. Previous to update it was left-click.
will this be solved in the forseable future?
br
edgar

entry.title: Does somebody know if the number labels color can be change in only one serie of data?
entry.content: Does somebody know if the number labels color can be change in only one serie of data? I have a chart on which i have 2 series of data, and sometime the data points are close by, and you cannot distinguished without using the hover over function. SO would it be possible to change the color of the "Target Funnel" to red?

entry.title: Issue with SortByValue in SAC Table – Missing Data for Secondary Measure
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve encountered an issue in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) while working with a table in a story. The table is structured with:

  • Columns: Two measures
  • Rows: A single dimension

When I apply a SortByValue on one of the measures, the data corresponding to the second measure in the table does not display correctly (or seems to disappear).

This behavior is puzzling because it worked as expected before, but one day it stopped displaying correctly. I’m unsure if this is due to a recent SAC update or if the data is somehow “stuck” or misaligned.

Has anyone else encountered a similar issue? Could this be related to a configuration change, a potential bug, or limitations in handling multi-measure tables?

Any suggestions or advice on how to resolve this would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

 

Before applying Sort by value:

 

After applying Sort by value:

entry.title: Currency Conversion Table - Category = Specific - "_" Underscore in Version Name
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have stumbled upon a curious error in Currency Conversion Table in SAC. I am using the following naming convention for Versions in planning models => "PLN_YYYY", f.e. "PLN_2025" which stands for PLAN_2025 public version. We have been using this naming convention for couple of years now and had no issues with it.

Today I tried to assign a currency conversion in the Currency Conversion Table to this specific Version but for some reason SAC does not accept the underscore "_" in the name of the Version (as you can see in the attached picture). Did this happen to any of you? Is this a new problem or has it been always like this? Is it possible to somehow make this work with the underscore or do we need to change the naming convention in order for it to work?

Thank you very much!

Adam

entry.title: Blank page when logging in SAC inside Excel Desktop
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to test the Excel Add-In for SAP Analytics Cloud, but when I log in, a blank page appears. I followed the steps provided in this link: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3192210, but the issue persists.

Has anyone encountered this error? If so, how did you solve it?

 

Thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: SAC - Data overlap in graphic
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a "combination stack columnn & line" chart but I have problem of Data overlap:

I've seen I can flag the option "Avoid data overlap" but I don't want the data to disappear:

Is there a way to put the datas of the line near the "point" and not on the "point"?

entry.title: IAS to SAC: User Updates Not Provisioned
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have provisioned users from IAS to SAC.

However, when I change a user in IAS (e.g., updating the last name) and run the Read job, the changes are not provisioned to the target system (SAC).

There is no error, but the users are read, and no update is performed in the target system.

What should I pay attention to and what needs to be configured to ensure that only the user changes are successfully provisioned?

 

Many Thanks

Best regard

entry.title: Labelling length of dimensions in the bar chart
entry.content:
In a table: I can change the label length from short to medium length.

I can't find this option in the bar chart. Is it not possible to adjust the label length in the bar chart?

Short and medium-length text is maintained in the source system.

entry.title: Parametrization Variables in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an example that includes the forecast of students enrolled in courses, such as bachelor's, master's, and postgraduate programs. Each level has a price, for instance, bachelor's €300, master's €1,000, and postgraduate €800. What I want is to make these prices configurable parameters, meaning I want to create two tables: one with the necessary information and another table containing these variables. This way, when the user wants to change the prices of higher education levels, the calculations will be updated automatically.

thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Allocation in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a scenario that I need help with. I upload data with a split on the members of [d/COUNTRY] and on [d/STORE] = "#". The same total is uploaded afterwords, but the other way around i.e. with a split on the members of [d/STORE] and [d/COUNTRY = "#". I now need to merge these two together with a Data Action while having almost the same original split on [d/COUNTRY] and [d/STORE].

Anyone have any ideas?

entry.title: SAC VDT
entry.content:
Here’s a rephrased version of your message:

Hello,

I’m encountering an issue in the SAC system with the VDT drill-into feature. After using drill-down, I’m unable to retain the original structure that I had before drilling in, and the hierarchy gets disconnected from the VDT.

I would like to know if there’s any option to preserve the initial structure.

Thanks in advance.

This version clarifies the issue and maintains a professional tone.

entry.title: How to Display Data Labels Inside Columns/Bars in SAC Story Charts
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m using a Bar/Column chart in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and would like to display the data labels inside the columns or bars, rather than outside or on top of them. I can’t find an option to do this in the settings.

Can someone help me with this? Is there a way to display the data labels inside the bars in SAC?

Current Design in SAC

the Expected Design

entry.title: Turning off notifications for Validation Rules updates
entry.content:
Hello SAC Community,

for some time I have been meaning to ask you, if any of you know, if there is a possibility in SAC, to turn off notifications that you receive from Validation Rules everytime there is an update in the given Dimension. We have a planning application that allows users to create new members in a Dimension. That Dimension is included in a Validation Rule in the model and everytime we create a new member in the Dimension, we receive the following notification. It is pretty annoying because we create upto 20 new dimension members in one go which creates 20 notifications. We have not found a way to turn these notifications off. Did any of you?

Thank you very much!

Adam Vacek Nekola

entry.title: Dynamic YoY Story Calculation - SAC
entry.content:
Hello,
I need to calculate YoY for YTD, QTD, and MTD. Since my reports are dynamic, it's essential to display the period at the top of the table. This makes it impractical to create restricted calculations like "QTD Current" & "QTD Previous."

I’ve used an advanced filter to set up a dynamic period (see below), but I’m unsure how to create a dynamic YOY comparison (restricted?) calculation. I need both a percentage and an amount difference. (Using the "YOY" formula in the measure, only works for yearly values.)

also, I don't want to use a "client calculation" on the table because it will require to recreate it every month/quarter/year as the time passes.

How can I achieve this?

Thanks
